activities.label: Design review
activities.source: Complete the program design review before any bench testing begins.

activities.label: Braking performance test
activities.source: [VR-110] Antilock braking shall be validated on the shared test rig.

activities.label: Regenerative braking test
activities.source: [VR-111] Regenerative braking coordination shall be validated on the test rig.

activities.label: Battery stress test (optional)
activities.source: An optional accelerated stress test may be run if rig time allows.

activities.label: Battery thermal test
activities.source: [VR-310] Battery over-temperature protection shall be validated.

activities.label: Final validation report
activities.source: Deliver the signed validation report by end of day 9.

constraints.label: Design review, then dynamics tests, then report
constraints.source: Run the design review first, then the dynamics tests in order, and write the report last.

constraints.label: Design review before battery test
constraints.source: The battery test cannot start until the design review is signed off.

constraints.label: Battery test before final report
constraints.source: Deliver the signed validation report by end of day 9.

constraints.label: Report due by day 9, 17:00
constraints.source: Deliver the signed validation report by end of day 9.

constraints.label: If the stress test is skipped, the battery test runs 1.5x longer
constraints.source: If the accelerated stress test is skipped, the standard battery test must run longer.
